name: Bricc Boy Crips Long Beach
description: The Bricc Boy Crips are based in North Long Beach, California. In 2015, California Attorney General Kamala Harris announced the indictment of 32 members for operating a $14.3 million identity theft and tax fraud scheme, stealing over $3.3 million through fraudulent tax returns using stolen identities.

sources.title: Bricc Boy Crips Long Beach — UnitedGangs
